content.en:
Rumble!!!

Ye Tian held a knife weapon and kept fighting with these source people, fortunately he fused many talents, and these source people were basically single or one or two talents, and they were basically flawed, otherwise he would not be an opponent at all.

One after another Yuan Ren fell, and Ye Tian's injuries became more and more serious.

In the Source Territory, the Great Immortal Technique could not be used, and the Semi-Chaotic Life Body had disappeared, making it very difficult to recover from his injuries.

Otherwise, he could easily consume this group of source people.

Fighting!

Madness!

Ye Tian's every move and style is natural, and it is incomparably compatible with the Great Dao, as if he is a natural son of the Great Dao, and when he fights with this group of Source People, he also learns their fighting methods.

Ye Tian forgot the time, forgot everything, and only cared about killing the source people constantly.

Finally.

There was no longer a source man in front of him, and he was half kneeling at the foot of the mountain, half of his body almost annihilated, but in the end he still won.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai barely recovered from some injuries.

"Win!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Immediately, he flew to the top of the mountain, to the giant tree.

The moment he reached the top of the mountain, he learned the name of this giant tree, the Origin Tree!

The Origin Tree is filled with the power of the Great Dao Origin, and fruits grow on it.

Ye Tian saw through the fruit one by one small source people, these little source people were pregnant in the fruit.

"The original man was born from these fruits!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Maybe he made it through the ultimate level, or maybe it took time for these Origin people to be conceived.

In short, these source people were not immediately conceived.

This saved Ye Tian from the trouble of fighting again!

Sitting cross-legged under the Origin Tree, Ye Tian investigated the Origin Tree while recovering from his injuries.

As the Lord of the Yuan Gu guessed, this source place may really not be a place of inheritance, at least he has come to the core of the source land, and he has not seen any inheritance.

However, once it falls in the source place, it will appear in a special space, and at that time it will get some treasures and be teleported out.

Ye Tian hasn't fallen now, but he doesn't know what to do.

Is it possible to commit suicide?

At this moment, a wave of turmoil rippled out.

Ye Tian's expression changed, and his figure disappeared instantly.

The next moment, he appeared in a space inside the Origin Tree.

This is the origin space of the Origin Tree!

In the Origin Space, there are endless Origin Rules and Origin Oceans.

Ye Tian was here, and he suddenly felt the majesty of the origin, and he faced this origin as if he was an ant.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian's gaze looked at the center of the origin space, there was a seed there, and the endless origin power emanated from that seed, and it could even be said that this space was created by this seed.

Ye Tian wanted to get close to this seed, but found that he couldn't get close at all, the huge pressure prevented him from getting closer, no matter how hard he tried, he couldn't get close.

Suddenly.

An illusory seed rushed towards Ye Tian, and at the same time, a wave of ideological power poured into Ye Tian's consciousness.

"Origin Seed...... Here you go...... Leave!"

Hearing this consciousness, Ye Tian was shocked.

This shows that this seed is conscious, and it also gives him this illusory seed, which is the Origin Seed.

"Give me a favor and let me go?"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Origin Seed should be very precious, but Ye Tian wants its seed body more, but his strength is not enough, if he forcibly takes it, I am afraid it will be dangerous.

Take it when you see it!

Ye Tian collected this Origin Seed, and the next moment, a force forcibly moved it out.

Rumble!!!!

A space, Ye Tian appeared here, presenting some rewards in front of him.

For example, some top-grade elixirs, some precious ores, a few Chaos Spirit Treasures, and a few Chaos Spirit Plants, etc.

Although these benefits could not be compared to the harvest of the Qilin Palace, Ye Tian was satisfied, because the harvest in the source land far exceeded these rewards.

Moreover, the value of that origin seed is probably extraordinary, and that is the real reward.

When Ye Tian received the reward, he was expelled from the source.

-------

Outside the Land of the Fallen Gods.

Ye Tian appeared, but the Lord of the Yuan Gu was no longer here.

He had been in the Source Land for so long, and it was strange that the Lord of the Yuan Gu was still here.

"Go back to the Terrans first!"

Ye Tian disappeared in an instant and returned to the human race.

Not long after, Ye Tian came back.

Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian first inquired about the situation in the Heavenly Pavilion, and then came to the Supreme Hall.

One supreme incarnation after another came, and these supremes were all summoned by Ye Tian.

When the Supremes were almost there, Ye Tian asked, "Everyone, how is the situation in the universe now?"

Although he still has the third and fourth deities, these two deities rarely come out, because the strength of these two deities is not strong, and they are not able to participate in the major events of the universe.

And the Mixed Yuan Supreme and Kunwu Supreme were able to contact the Lord of the Yuan Gu and were qualified to participate in the Supreme Conference, so they naturally knew more.

Kunwu Supreme said: "Ten Thousand Law Supreme, the situation in the universe is not good, now many cultivators in the Cangyu Universe have broken into our universe, and there are even some Earth Venerables who have broken in. Three thousand years ago, a powerful Earth Venerable fought with the Stone Dragon Supreme, and the Stone Dragon Supreme was hit hard, and the opponent's strength was probably infinitely close to the level of a one-star god general. Fortunately, it was suppressed by the universe, otherwise in that battle, the Stone Dragon Supreme might have fallen. Something like this has happened many times, and the two universes have begun to meet each other in the first place. Moreover, some of the great clans of the universe may have already taken refuge in the Cangyu Universe, and it is even rumored that some cultivators have entered the Cangyu Universe and directly joined the Holy Land of the Cangyu Universe!"

The Supreme Kunwu said a lot, but in short, the situation in the universe is very serious.

And the Supremes also gave this universe a name, called - Eternal Universe!

"The strength of the Cangyu Universe should be clear, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's clear!" Kunwu Supreme said: "From the intelligence of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, I know that there are 23 god-level powerhouses on the bright side of the Cangyu Universe, and the strongest one is the peak of the two-star god general, but he is currently in retreat. A three-star god-level powerhouse, there should be no one in the Cangyu universe!"

"The Lord of the Yuan Gu has already hit the one-star god general-level combat power, and with the Ten Thousand Law Supreme, our Ten Thousand Ancient Universe currently only has two god-level powerhouses!" Kun Wu Supreme added.

"What about the reincarnated?"

Ye Tian asked again.

Kunwu Supreme said: "There is not much information, only a few reincarnated people have appeared, judging from the current strength, they should all be first-class supremes, they often haunt some resource-rich worlds, secret realms, forbidden places, and often rob the resources of some cosmic clans, it should be that they want to collect a large number of resources to improve their strength." "

"Okay, I see! Don't move for the time being, if there is anything big, notify me immediately, I need to retreat for a while!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

Ladies and gentlemen, answered.

Immediately.

Ye Tian returned to the Heavenly Pavilion and began to retreat, sorting out the harvest of the source, it should be said that it was the talent and the Chaos Dao.

At this moment, the talent obtained in the source land is merging with its own talent, and the Chaos Dao is also merging, if it weren't for Ye Tian suppressing it, it would have been impossible to control it a long time ago.

Now, after the meeting, he naturally has to retreat immediately, otherwise he will not be able to control it.
